Manufacturing Business Outlook Survey

May 2026 Manufacturing Business Outlook Survey

Released: May 15, 2026

Diffusion Indexes

The following table presents diffusion indexes for the May 2026 survey. Diffusion indexes represent the percentage of firms reporting an increase minus the percentage reporting a decrease.

Indicator Current Month Prior Month Six-Month Forecast
General Activity 40.2 8.5 36.9
New Orders 22.5 12.3 29.4
Shipments 18.7 -3.1 25.0
Unfilled Orders -5.3 -8.2 4.1
Delivery Times -2.1 1.4 -1.8
Inventories -10.4 -14.7 3.2
Prices Paid 55.3 42.6 48.7
Prices Received 23.8 16.1 30.5
Number of Employees 12.1 5.4 18.3
Average Employee Workweek -3.7 -6.2 2.9
Capital Expenditures 14.5 11.8 22.6
Technology Spending 19.3 15.0 27.4

* Seasonally adjusted

Special Questions

This month's special questions asked firms about their hiring plans.
